## Summary

What does this PR do? One or two sentences.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for changed code
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `mypy praxia` pass
- [ ] Documentation updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] No real-company names or trademarked terms used as demo data
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or customer-specific data in commits

## Related issues

Fixes #(issue) / Refs #(issue)

## Notes for reviewers

Anything reviewers should focus on?
